errors.ERR_SIGNATURE_INVALID: The Ed25519 verification returned false (math mismatch).
errors.ERR_SIGNATURE_LENGTH: The signature is not exactly 64 bytes.
errors.ERR_PUBLIC_KEY_LENGTH: The public key is not exactly 32 bytes.
errors.ERR_NON_CANONICAL_ENCODING: The raw input is not encoded as RFC8785-JCS canonical JSON.
errors.ERR_MERKLE_ROOT_MISMATCH: The computed Merkle root does not match the supplied root.
